Where It Comes From

SourceNotes
SpriteAtlas image A5DDF38C-5A6F-907D-7F4D-2591C636C453 / artifact_unique_mantis_core
CrateCrate Unique Artifact: crate 99.8%, artifact 99.9%
How it shows upUnique artifacts are spawned from the server and resolved when the item is picked up.
Stat ruleThis family is marked unique and cannot be upgraded.
Boss linkNo direct boss match in the client data.
Combat readClose-range brawling
